reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwMXFHVjl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
I had old window tinting, from another company, that wasn’t good and FWT worked very hard to safely remove the old bubbly tint and save the rear defrosters from getting damaged.

Then, they applied the new tint and it looks better than it ever did! They did a great job communicating and updating the work, even sending a picture with all tint removed, and updating start and end time for finishing the job.

I would strongly recommend them for any and all window tinting and will use them again in the future.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for this glowing review! We appreciate your business!

reviews.comment:
I couldn't be happier with my experience with Frederick Window Tenting!

Sharyn was flexible with her schedule and extremely communicative and understanding throughout the process. Danny did amazing professional work and chose the perfect tint for my car.

If you're looking for the right place to get your car's window's tinted, don't look any farther than FWT!

reviews.comment:
Frederick Window Tinting did an absolutely fantastic job with tinting both our Tucson and F-150. Sharyn was very easy to work with and made the entire process start to finish easy, especially with us having our baby and taking care of both cars on the same day. Everyone was friendly and cordial and we could not have had a better experience! The tinting looks amazing too and makes all the difference in the world for heat with the vehicles!

We would highly recommend FWT to everyone who is looking to get their windows tinted. Thanks for everything!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you Caitlin! We appreciate the business and review! Hope to see you again in the future!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4a0tpUE1REAE

reviews.comment:
I can't recommend this place enough. I scheduled an appointment on a Thursday night for a Saturday morning appointment to have all my windows tinted, plus the sun strip on the front windshield. I was able to just park in a spot, drop off my keys, and let them do their thing.
Throughout the day I was able to communicate with them through texting, and they'd reply almost immediately. I was able to pay early through CashApp to save time when I went to pick up my car (Plus I saved 5% by using the app).
They did an incredible job! 6/5 stars would recommend.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for entrusting us with your vehicle! We're so glad you're happy with the work and hope to see you again soon!
